repos.name: rhdh-templates
repos.description: RHDH scaffolder templates for bootstrapping new services via the internal developer portal.

repos.name: devops-api
repos.description: FastAPI service that orchestrates DNS records, HAProxy load-balancer configs, and chat messages by delegating to AWX, ArgoCD, Vault, and Bitbucket.

repos.name: apis-library
repos.description: Shared Python library with async connectors for AWX, ArgoCD, Bitbucket, and Vault, plus a reusable FastAPI application factory.

repos.name: aws-terraform-bootstrap
repos.description: Step 1, once per AWS account: one-time Terraform that creates the shared S3 bucket used for Terragrunt remote state across all projects — must exist before devtools-labs can apply.

repos.name: minikube-ami
repos.description: Step 2, once per AWS account: Packer template building the golden AMI for the devtools-labs Minikube EC2 instance — Docker, kubectl, Helm, and Minikube pre-installed. Must exist before devtools-labs's minikube unit can apply.

repos.name: aws-xray-db-sync
repos.description: Lambda that runs every minute to sync JFrog Xray offline DB bundles to S3, with SNS alerts on success or failure.

repos.name: devtools-labs
repos.description: Step 3: Terraform + Terragrunt that bootstraps Minikube + ArgoCD. From there, ArgoCD's ApplicationSets auto-discover and auto-sync every cluster-infra tool and devtool (ingress, secrets sync, tunnel, Jira, Bitbucket, Confluence, Artifactory, ArgoCD) — none of it is ever applied by hand.
